results.title: Introduction to The NanoVi® - Oxidative Stress Relief | Repair Cell Damage with NanoVi
results.raw_content:
## Meet the

## Click and Rotate to Explore

×

## Models

NanoVi Exo®

NanoVi Pro®

NanoVi Eco®

The NanoVi Eco® is the most economical way to bring the benefits of NanoVi® technology right into your home. The simple touch screen makes it easy to set yourself up for a relaxing session that promotes cellular health and relieves oxidative stress damage. The standard session time for the Eco is 60 minutes and this can be broken into shorter sessions. People trying to regain cellular health and boost vitality may use the NanoVi Eco® for longer than the standard 60-minute session and often do more than one session a day. [...] The NanoVi Exo® is the newest and most powerful NanoVi® option. It is twice as powerful as the Pro, or four times more powerful than the Eco. To compare, 15 minutes on the Exo is like 30 minutes on the Pro or 60 minutes on the Eco. The Exo delivers far more benefits in the time you spend using it, and most people go longer than the basic 15-minute session. The Exo is ideal for performance athletes, private users who want a big impact in a little time, and wellness professionals helping their clients regain vitality. In a center, the Exo can handle twice as many of your clients since shorter sessions means faster turnaround times.

Get a Quote

## Types of Uses [...] The NanoVi Pro® is the perfect tradeoff between price and performance. The Pro device is twice as powerful as the Eco with an equivalent session time of 30 minutes. Shorter sessions make it easy for multiple family members to share time on the NanoVi Pro® and home users can easily do more than one session a day. A 30-minute session often fits well for clinics and centers where NanoVi is offered as a standalone service or in conjunction with another service. [...] ## Accelerate Recovery

The NanoVi® is there for you when you need it the most.
Our technology is used to accelerate repair of oxidative
stress damage and cellular damage to help you recover.

## Types of Uses

Cell damage is natural and affects everyone. With the NanoVi, users at various levels of health find benefit. Whether increasing athletic performance or facing chronic health degradation, the NanoVi is the perfect complement.

## Improve Performance

Recovery after exertion is the key to resilience and performance. The NanoVi® can help your body address and repair oxidative stress damage.

## Maintain Wellness

Users rely on the NanoVi® device to slow the aging process. Accelerating the repair of ongoing cellular damage is one of the best things you can do for yourself.

## Accelerate Recovery
